name: Service Corporation International
description: Service Corporation International (SCI) is North America’s leading provider of funeral, cremation, and cemetery services. Founded in 1962 and headquartered in Houston, Texas, the company operates an extensive network of funeral homes and cemeteries across the United States and Canada. SCI offers a comprehensive range of deathcare products and services, supporting families during their most difficult and personal times. Through its commitment to excellence and compassionate care, the company has established itself as a prominent leader in the deathcare industry, providing professional guidance and memorialization options to communities throughout the continent.
